# daytona_account_providers (Data Source)

Lists external account providers available to Daytona users.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_account_providers" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Available account providers. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) Provider display name.
- `name` (String) Provider name.
